/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -march=x86-64-v2 -mtune=generic -flto -fno-rtti -fno-exceptions -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_html_parser.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_html_parser.dir/test_html_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_html_parser.dir/__/src/parser/html_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_html_parser.dir/__/src/parser/tokenizer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_html_parser.dir/__/src/ir/dom_node.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_html_parser.dir/__/src/util/string_pool.cpp.o -o test_html_parser
